microsoft_ft: Built a **growth system** from scratch — scaled Azure's recovery validation from a 2-person op into a platformized, self-service product sustaining 45+ annual drills and driving **$14M+ business impact** across Databricks, Walmart, SAP, and NetApp.

Owned the **signal layer** across 14 cross-org recovery executions, including a sovereign-cloud network isolation test tied to a **$1.5B+ contract**, defining trustworthy metrics before each experiment shipped.
Scaled team leverage by building an internal **AI agent** for drill planning, cutting planning cycle time by 39% and expanding drill capacity by 21% — embedding AI directly into the product loop.
microsoft_2023: Drove **activation and adoption** for AI-driven code generation workflows, running user demos and training that moved utilization across 14 key teams and saved **37 engineering hours** monthly.

Shaped the product roadmap toward intent-based YAML generation by running **11+ user interviews** with Azure service teams, surfacing critical feature gaps and turning ambiguous signals into a prioritized build.

Improved the **signal layer** for documentation retrieval by enforcing metadata standards and migrating to an AI-powered semantic search tool, cutting lookup time by **83%** and making downstream experiments more trustworthy.
microsoft_2022: Generated **$3M in accelerated revenue** and launched regions 28% faster by securing cross-functional alignment on a unified automation prioritization framework spanning 140+ teams.

Ran structured **discovery across 20+ service teams** to quantify 81 hours of manual toil per region launch, then built a roadmap to automate critical paths — turning a one-off audit into a compounding efficiency loop.
Built a **Power BI funnel dashboard** tracking operational toil across 140+ teams, giving leadership a trustworthy signal layer to target automation gaps and prioritize high-impact investments.
amazon_robotics: Defined the **migration strategy** for a 2,000+ unit OS transition, mapping dependencies across 1,200+ stations and achieving **zero operational downtime** during the pilot — shipping fast and iterating against live production signals.

Prioritized a 40+ ticket backlog across sprint cycles, resolving high-severity issues to stabilize the developer intake process and compress the **activation loop** for new robotics software releases.
Drove cross-functional alignment across IT, Operations, and Engineering to implement **automated CI/CD pipelines**, accelerating the software deployment cycle by 25% and reducing manual handoffs.
pro_painters: Owned the **end-to-end GTM funnel** — acquisition through conversion — managing 200+ monthly proposals via a new CRM workflow that increased job bookings by **26%** and cut proposal turnaround time.

Reduced **Customer Acquisition Cost by 13%** and lifted conversion by 2.7% by executing a digital-first go-to-market strategy, optimizing the website and Google profile to improve top-of-funnel quality.
